instruction: In Safari's settings, set the homepage to {URL}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4); Tier-A defaults reads com.apple.Safari HomePage

args: defaults write com.apple.Safari HomePage -string 'https://www.cove.invalid/'; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.Safari HomePage -string '{URL}'; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
